content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 18, 2003

Trent Benedetti, Treasurer
Friends of Abel Maldonado
Benedetti & Associates
2151 So. College Drive, Suite 101
Santa Maria, CA 93455-1304

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-195

Dear Mr. Benedetti:

This letter is in response to your request for advice on behalf of Friends of Abel Maldonado regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 Pursuant to your request in our telephone conversation on September 17, 2003, your request for advice is withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

HBA:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-03-195

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
